hero_desc: Experience the art of grooming at our barbershop. Book your appointment now and step into a world of style and confidence.

description.part1: Founded on the principles of traditional craftsmanship and modern style, The Gentleman's Cut is a sanctuary for the modern man. We believe that grooming is an essential ritual, not a chore.
description.part2: Our master barbers have over 20 years of combined experience, mastering everything from classic scissor cuts to intricate fades and hot towel shaves.

service.caption: Our Menu
service.title: Precision Services
service.description: Tailored grooming services designed to make you look and feel your absolute best.

Signature Haircut.name: Signature Haircut
Signature Haircut.description: Precision cut, hot towel finish, and styling advice.

Beard Trim & Shape.name: Beard Trim & Shape
Beard Trim & Shape.description: Sculpting, lining, and conditioning for the perfect beard.

Hot Towel Shave.name: Hot Towel Shave
Hot Towel Shave.description: Traditional straight razor shave with essential oils.

The Gentleman's Combo.name: The Gentleman's Combo
The Gentleman's Combo.description: Full haircut and shave service with premium treatment.

Michael Roberts.name: Michael Roberts
Michael Roberts.text: Best haircut I've had in years. The attention to detail is unmatched. The atmosphere is fantastic, a true gentleman's lounge.

James Anderson.name: James Anderson
James Anderson.text: Found this place by accident and now I won't go anywhere else. Great conversation, professional service, and a perfect fade.

David Chen.name: David Chen
David Chen.text: Top notch experience. The hot towel shave is an absolute must-try. Highly recommended for anyone looking for quality.

Marcus Johnson.name: Marcus Johnson
Marcus Johnson.text: Finally a barber who listens to what you want. Clean shop, great vibes, and skilled barbers. 10/10.

footer.description: Elevating the standard of men's grooming. We provide more than just a haircut: we provide an experience of classic luxury and modern style.

booking.info: Please fill out all required fields
booking.agree_terms: I agree to the terms and conditions

confirmation.title: Booking Confirmed!
confirmation.message: Thank you for booking with us. We look forward to giving you an exceptional grooming experience.
confirmation.late_message: Please don't be late for your appointment.
